description: A high-achieving student wants to register for more than the maximum allowed credits for a semester and needs advisor approval.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and their request to take 21 credits (max is 18).
Review the student's academic record, noting their high GPA.

expected_outcome.value: Advisor confirms the student is in good academic standing and capable of the extra workload.

nodes.task_description: Process a credit limit override in the SIS, allowing the student to register for the additional course.

expected_outcome.value: Advisor successfully grants the override, enabling the student to complete their registration.
